name: Improve solver3 constraint-scenario oracle construction on broad suite

description: Baseline broad-suite construction+search aggregate after scaffold fallback and 30% construction budget
Penalize oracle template scaffold disruption 3x to preserve search-friendly basins
Tried 5x scaffold-disruption penalty; worse than 3x due larger constrained/real-world regressions
Tried 2x scaffold-disruption penalty; better raw total via Sailing but worse log aggregate and constrained SGP balance
Tried 2.5x scaffold-disruption penalty; still worse than 3x despite lower raw total
Tried stronger outside-region move penalty in merge; improved Sailing/raw total but worsened log aggregate
Tried lower omitted-group penalty to allow smaller templates; broad log regressed
Tried stronger same-group keep bonus during merge; broad log still worse than 3x
